title: Vanity: Handy Tools
description: New look for tools + alternative variants
body:
### Adds styles to [Vanity: Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core), accessible by default  
### Simply put item in Vanity's Styling Table 
| Retextures          | Alternatives          |
|:-------------------:|:---------------------:|
| Machete (Sword)     |                       |
| Pickaxe             | Hammer                |
| Axe                 |                       |
| Shovel              |                       |
| Hoe                 | Sickle                |
| Pruner (Shears)     |                       |
| Lighter (Flint And Steel)| Matches          |

### Picture with all retextures and alternative styles:
![all items, ver 1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b3dZPsMr/images/3edcd49a0b9ff40c6ad959cfbdf3aff392e89031.png)  
_(all items, ver 1.0)_
